body:
The Brassburg server is a 21+ whitelisted server focused on the wonders of Create mod.
This pack is made to enhance the experience of create and all it's wonders. We are a mature and friendly community that are enjoying the creation of train, machines and farms.

[APPLY](https://discord.com/invite/TbA2m5APk4) today! 

For more information visit [brassburg.se](https://brassburg.se/)
